rationale: Both reviews agree on the True-placeholder findings. The decisive difference is IsUnipotent: Review 1 correctly identifies the GroupLike-vs-AlgPoints mismatch (AlgPoints is defined but unused; docstring claims G(k)), which is clearly grounded in the diff and actionable. Review 2's third finding instead makes a questionable mathematical claim ('only identity satisfies') and prescribes a vague representation-theoretic refactor, which if followed could waste effort or misdirect the author.
